headline: Teledyne Supports NASA’s Artemis II Mission with Critical Technologies Across Multiple Businesses
summary: THOUSAND OAKS, Calif., April 09, 2026--Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) today announced its broad support of NASA’s Artemis II mission, with multiple Teledyne businesses delivering mission‑critical technologies that help power, protect, connect, and track America’s first crewed voyage around the Moon in more than 50 years.

content.title: Teledyne Supports NASA’s Artemis II Mission with Critical Technologies Across Multiple Businesses
content.summary: THOUSAND OAKS, Calif., April 09, 2026--Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) today announced its broad support of NASA’s Artemis II mission, with multiple Teledyne businesses delivering mission‑critical technologies that help power, protect, connect, and track America’s first crewed voyage around the Moon in more than 50 years.

thumbnail.caption: Teledyne’s technologies across NASA’s record-setting Artemis II mission.

headline: Assessing Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Valuation After Prism SKR Autonomy Platform Upgrade
summary: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) is back in focus after Teledyne FLIR OEM upgraded its Prism SKR software into a unified, closed-loop autonomy platform for guided weapon systems, sharpening attention on the company’s defense focused digital imaging capabilities. See our latest analysis for Teledyne Technologies. The recent Prism SKR upgrade comes during a strong run in the stock, with Teledyne Technologies showing a 27.28% year to date share price return and a 40.88% total shareholder return over...
